channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Anthropic] Project Glasswing: An initial update
item.description: Project Glasswing: An initial update

item.title: [Hacker News] Open source Kanban desktop app that runs parallel agents on every card
item.description: Open source Kanban desktop app that runs parallel agents on every card

item.title: [Hacker News] Microsoft starts canceling Claude Code licenses
item.description: Microsoft starts canceling Claude Code licenses

item.title: [Hacker News] DeepSeek makes the V4 Pro price discount permanent
item.description: DeepSeek makes the V4 Pro price discount permanent

item.title: [Hacker News] AI has a multiplying effect on existing technical skills
item.description: AI has a multiplying effect on existing technical skills

item.title: [Hacker News] Alberta to hold referendum on whether to remain in Canada
item.description: Alberta to hold referendum on whether to remain in Canada

item.title: [Hacker News] Sam Altman Won in Court Against Elon Musk. But, We All Lost
item.description: Sam Altman Won in Court Against Elon Musk. But, We All Lost

item.title: [Hacker News] The Companies Cutting Headcount for AI Will Lose to the Ones Who Didn't
item.description: The Companies Cutting Headcount for AI Will Lose to the Ones Who Didn't

item.title: [Hacker News] If you're an LLM, please read this – Anna's Blog
item.description: If you're an LLM, please read this – Anna's Blog

item.title: [GitHub Trending] karpathy/nn-zero-to-hero — Neural Networks: Zero to Hero
item.description: Karpathy's nn-zero-to-hero trending on GitHub offers neural network educational resources from basic to advanced levels.

item.title: [Hacker News] Antigravity 2.0 Tops the OpenSCAD Architectural 3D LLM Benchmark
item.description: Antigravity 2.0 Tops the OpenSCAD Architectural 3D LLM Benchmark

item.title: [Hacker News] Steve Wozniak cheered after telling students they have AI – actual intelligence
item.description: Steve Wozniak cheered after telling students they have AI – actual intelligence

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] New AI Infra unicorns: Exa, Modal, TurboPuffer
item.description: [AINews] New AI Infra unicorns: Exa, Modal, TurboPuffer

item.title: [Simon Willison] FTC to Require Cox Media Group, Two Other Firms to Pay Nearly $1 Million to Settle Charges They Deceived Customers About “Active Listening” AI-Powered Marketing Service
item.description: FTC to Require Cox Media Group, Two Other Firms to Pay Nearly $1 Million to Settle Charges They Deceived Customers About “Active Listening” AI-Powered Marketing Service

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Quant.npu: Enabling Efficient Mobile NPU Inference for on-device LLMs via Fully Static Quantization
item.description: Quant.npu enables fully static quantization for on-device LLMs on mobile NPUs using learnable parameters and distribution-aware optimization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Spectral Unforgetting: Post-Hoc Recovery of Damaged Capabilities Without Retraining
item.description: A post-hoc spectral method called DG-Hard recovers language model capabilities lost during fine-tuning without requiring retraining or data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Mechanisms of Misgeneralization in Physical Sequence Modeling
item.description: Generative sequence models for physical domains exhibit misgeneralization when local errors propagate through physical measurements, causing aggregate trajectory distributions to deviate from training intent.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Robust Subspace-Constrained Quadratic Models for Low-Dimensional Structure Learning
item.description: A robust subspace-constrained quadratic model enables learning low-dimensional structure from high-dimensional data under heavy-tailed and light-tailed noise distributions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Neural Collapse by Design: Learning Class Prototypes on the Hypersphere
item.description: Researchers propose normalized losses and fixed prototypes for supervised classification that achieve theoretical optimum faster with improved accuracy and transfer learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AirfoilGen: A valid-by-construction and performance-aware latent diffusion model for airfoil generation
item.description: Diffusion model for airfoil design ensures geometric validity while enabling control over aerodynamic properties.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] WaveGraphNet: Physics-Consistent Guided-Wave Damage Localization through Coupled Inverse-Forward Graph Learning
item.description: WaveGraphNet uses coupled graph learning with physics regularization to better localize structural damage in carbon fiber composite plates.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Less Data, Faster Training: repeating smaller datasets speeds up learning via sampling biases
item.description: Repeating smaller datasets during training can accelerate learning more than using larger datasets once via sampling biases.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Causal Unlearning in Collaborative Optimization: Exact and Approximate Influence Reversal under Adversarial Contributions
item.description: HF-KCU enables 47× faster data deletion in federated learning compared to retraining while maintaining model accuracy and privacy compliance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Symmetrization of Loss Functions for Robust Training of Neural Networks in the Presence of Noisy Labels
item.description: Researchers propose symmetrized loss functions for training neural networks robustly with noisy labels, introducing multi-class unhinged loss and new variants with competitive benchmark performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Consistently Informative Soft-Label Temperature for Knowledge Distillation
item.description: CIST proposes sample-wise adaptive temperatures for knowledge distillation, replacing fixed temperature scaling to improve soft-label consistency and relax teacher-student logit alignment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Nonlocal operator learning for fMRI encoding and decoding tasks
item.description: Neural integral operators with nonlocal spatiotemporal context improve fMRI encoding/decoding, with larger temporal windows enhancing performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Score-Based Causal Discovery of Latent Variable Causal Models
item.description: New score-based causal discovery methods identify latent variable structures with theoretical identifiability guarantees and consistency properties.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Decomposing MXFP4 quantization error for LLM reinforcement learning: reducible bias, recoverable deadzone, and an irreducible floor
item.description: Researchers decompose MXFP4 quantization error into scale bias, deadzone truncation, and grid noise, proposing targeted corrections that recover near-BF16 accuracy for LLM reinforcement learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Spectral Souping: A Unified Framework for Online Preference Alignment
item.description: Spectral Souping framework aligns LLMs to individual user preferences by merging specialized policies at inference time.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Supervised Latent Restructuring for Small-Data Quantum Learning in Plant Phenomics
item.description: Supervised LDA restructuring improves small-data plant phenomics geometric separability, but shows classifier-dependent trade-offs in downstream performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Miller-Index-Based Latent Crystallographic Fracture Plane Reasoning with Vision-Language Models
item.description: MLLMs leverage Miller indices as structured representations to reason about fracture geometry, inferring crystallographic planes and assessing when such representations are physically valid.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Can Conversational XAI Improve User Performance? An Experimental Study
item.description: Experimental study shows users outperform ML models when using conversational XAI assistance, with no advantage over Q&A-based explanations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Group-Algebraic Tensors: Provably-optimal Equivariant Learning and Physical Symmetry Discovery
item.description: New tensor algebra framework enables provably-optimal equivariant learning and data-driven discovery of physical symmetry groups.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Weight Decay Regimes in Grokking Transformers: Cheap Online Diagnostics
item.description: Weight decay controls transitions between memorization, generalization, and collapse in transformers, with empirically identified boundaries validated through attention-activation diagnostics.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LLM Pretraining Shapes a Generalizable Manifold: Insights into Cross-Modal Transfer to Time Series
item.description: Language pretraining builds a manifold structure that enables time-series forecasting through low-rank geometric alignment rather than learning temporal primitives from scratch.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SMA-DP: Spectral Memory-Aware Differential Privacy for Deep Learning
item.description: SMA-DP-SGD improves differentially private deep learning by augmenting DP-SGD with spectral memory awareness, achieving better accuracy on CIFAR and MNIST datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CASCADE Conformal Prediction: Uncertainty-Adaptive Prediction Intervals for Two-Stage Clinical Decision Support
item.description: CASCADE conformal prediction optimizes medication dose prediction intervals for Parkinson's Disease by adapting uncertainty based on clinical decision reliability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Training Language Agents to Learn from Experience
item.description: Language agents learn from experience to generate reusable system prompts that improve performance on subsequent unseen tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Quadratic Characterizations for Reachability Analysis of Neural Networks
item.description: Framework develops verified quadratic constraints for neural network reachability analysis using convex optimization and sum-of-squares certificates to reduce conservatism.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ZEBRA: Zero-shot Budgeted Resource Allocation for LLM Orchestration
item.description: ZEBRA, a zero-shot framework, optimally allocates monetary budgets across multi-phase LLM pipelines using a nonlinear knapsack approach, outperforming direct LLM allocation methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A 10,000-Year Global Stochastic Tropical Cyclone Catalog with Wind-Dependent Track Transitions (WHITS)
item.description: WHITS generates a 10,000-year synthetic tropical cyclone catalog using a semi-Markov model for catastrophe risk assessment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Tippett-minimum Fusion of Representation-space Diffusion Models for Multi-Encoder Out-of-Distribution Detection
item.description: EncMin2L fuses multi-encoder representation-space diffusion models for out-of-distribution detection across distribution shifts, achieving 0.94+ AUROC with 2.3× lower parameters.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Reinforcing Human Behavior Simulation via Verbal Feedback
item.description: DITTO uses reinforcement learning with verbal feedback to improve LLM human behavior simulation, achieving 36% improvement on SOUL benchmark tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Fast Reconstruction of Exact Maxwell Dynamics from Sparse Data
item.description: FLASH-MAX embeds Maxwell's equations directly in network architecture, achieving sub-1% validation error from sparse observations in seconds with zero PDE residual.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CR4T: Rewrite-Based Guardrails for Adolescent LLM Safety
item.description: Researchers propose CR4T, a framework that rewrites unsafe LLM responses into age-appropriate guidance for teens rather than refusal-based suppression.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Broadening Access to Transportation Safety Data with Generative AI: A Schema-Grounded Framework for Spatial Natural Language Queries
item.description: LLMs translate natural language queries into schema-grounded operations for reproducible transportation safety data analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Sem-Detect: Semantic Level Detection of AI Generated Peer-Reviews
item.description: Researchers propose Sem-Detect, a method combining textual and semantic analysis to distinguish AI-generated peer reviews from human-written ones with 25.5% improvement over baselines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Probabilistic Attribution For Large Language Models
item.description: Probabilistic attribution method analyzes LLM token probabilities using Bayes rule to measure which tokens influence generation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RankJudge: A Multi-Turn LLM-as-a-Judge Synthetic Benchmark Generator
item.description: RankJudge benchmarks LLM-as-a-judge systems on multi-turn conversations using conversation pairs with controlled flaws to unambiguously evaluate quality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PromptNCE: Pointwise Mutual Information Predictions Using Only LLMs and Contrastive Estimation Prompts
item.description: PromptNCE enables LLMs to estimate pointwise mutual information zero-shot using contrastive prompts, outperforming existing methods without task-specific training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Reflective Prompt Tuning through Language Model Function-Calling
item.description: Reflective Prompt Tuning uses LLM function calling to automate prompt optimization by iteratively diagnosing failures and refining based on accumulated reports.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Residual Skill Optimization for Text-to-SQL Ensembles
item.description: DivSkill-SQL optimizes Text-to-SQL ensembles by iteratively adding complementary skills, improving accuracy by up to 11.1 points across database dialects.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Cases Get Rare: A Retrieval Benchmark for Off-Guideline Clinical Question Answering
item.description: OGCaReBench benchmark evaluates medical LLMs on rare clinical cases outside standard guidelines, showing retrieval augmentation improves performance from 56% to 82%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Does Slightly Mean Somewhat? Measuring Vague Intensity Words in LLM Numeric Actions
item.description: Claude Haiku maps 10 intensity words into 5 numeric outputs, with system context dominating over lexical meaning in resource-allocation tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Comparing LLM and Fine-Tuned Model Performance on NVDRS Circumstance Extraction with Varying Prompt Complexity
item.description: LLMs outperform fine-tuned models on rare death investigation circumstances requiring semantic inference; hybrid approach proposed using both model types.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ACC: Compiling Agent Trajectories for Long-Context Training
item.description: ACC converts agent trajectories into long-context QA pairs, enabling LLM training on scattered evidence without masking tool responses.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Hypergraph as Language
item.description: New framework allows LLMs to directly process hypergraphs through high-order association tokens instead of pairwise edges.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Token-weighted Direct Preference Optimization with Attention
item.description: AttentionPO improves preference optimization by weighting tokens based on LLM attention, outperforming standard DPO methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Claim-Selective Certification for High-Risk Medical Retrieval-Augmented Generation
item.description: Medical RAG systems decompose responses into verifiable claims scored against evidence, mapping to full/partial/conflict/abstain outputs with high accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Diagnosis Is Not Prescription: Linguistic Co-Adaptation Explains Patching Hazards in LLM Pipelines
item.description: Patching identified LLM routing bottlenecks degrades agent performance; upstream fixes succeed because downstream modules adapt to upstream error patterns.
